title: Module-level zeroization doc is better than inline TODO comments
description: ZEROIZATION GAP inline comments were removed. They referred to a future raw-HTTP rewrite (crate-secretsx-hpx) and cluttered the logic. The module-level Zeroization section is the right home: it gives users the information before they pick the backend, and it does not imply the code is temporary or broken. Do not move this back to inline comments. The zeroization limitation is a known design constraint of using vaultrs, not a bug waiting for a fix.
